mnemonics: B.E.S.T. Buildings: Building Automation, Energy Star, Smart Sensors, Tenant Engagement
keyPoints: BMS integrates HVAC, lighting, and security for energy efficiency
Real-time monitoring optimizes resource use and reduces waste
Automated controls respond to occupancy and environmental conditions
commonMistakes: Focusing only on initial cost rather than long-term energy savings
Neglecting to integrate BMS with other sustainability initiatives
Failing to update system software and maintain sensors regularly
